budget_cap: stop on plateau or 100% pass rate
test_inputs: Configure plannotator in Codex CLI and submit a plan safely.
Run code review manually and get the feedback back to the agent.
Use plannotator over SSH or devcontainer without port confusion, and review a non-git file.

evals.name: Validated stdin
evals.question: Does the skill preserve the verified python JSON stdin format and warn against the failing heredoc path?
evals.pass: The skill includes the python tool_input format and the Failed to parse hook event from stdin warning.
evals.fail: The validated stdin guidance is missing.

evals.name: Manual review limitation
evals.question: Does the skill warn that manual code review UI does not automatically deliver feedback back into the active agent session?
evals.pass: It says manual plannotator review or scripts/review.sh does not automatically send feedback to the active session and gives a workaround.

evals.name: Git requirement
evals.question: Does the skill explain that Code Review requires a git repo and provide a temp-repo workaround?
evals.pass: It explicitly states the repo requirement and includes a minimal git init -q flow.
evals.fail: The requirement is implicit or missing.

evals.name: Port conflict guidance
evals.question: Does the skill help recover from stale ports or multiple local instances?
evals.pass: It includes both pkill plannotator cleanup and a fixed PLANNOTATOR_PORT=19432 example.

evals.name: Hook-mode notes
evals.question: Does the skill preserve the existing note that save-to-notes buttons only work in hook mode?
evals.fail: The note is removed or weakened.

experiments.description: Fixed 3-scenario baseline; manual review caveats, git requirement, and stale-port recovery were not explicit enough.
Added a dedicated limitations and workaround block covering manual review feedback loss, temp git repos, and fixed-port recovery.

summary.stop_reason: Reached 100% pass rate on the fixed eval suite.
